description_long: This apartment building is a large, multi-tower structure with a modern, geometric design, featuring several interconnected rectangular volumes of varying heights. The facade is predominantly light-colored, with a grid of narrow, vertically and horizontally aligned windows that create a rhythmic pattern across the exterior. The building sits on a dark, raised platform that mimics an urban lot, and the base includes a recessed entry area and some stepped landscaping. The tallest tower rises significantly above the others, while the shorter wings extend outward, creating a dynamic skyline. There are subtle variations in window size and placement, and some sections have vertical strips that break up the monotony of the facade. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, multi-tower apartment building with a light facade, grid-like window patterns, and a dynamic, geometric form. The structure features several interconnected volumes of varying heights and a raised urban platform.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with the tallest tower on the left, a stepped base, and a prominent entry area at the lower center.
description_view_1: From this angle, the building's depth and the staggered arrangement of the towers are visible, with more emphasis on the rear and side volumes.
description_view_2: This side view shows the elongated profile of the building, with the towers aligned in a row and the stepped base extending to the right.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the verticality of the two main towers and reveals additional window groupings and facade details on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with both vertical and horizontal alignment, creating a sense of order and rhythm. Some sections feature grouped or staggered windows, adding visual interest and breaking up the facade.
